title: Status Contributor
description: Frontmatter schema for `<framework>/status/contributor.md` files. Consumed by the project-status aggregator. Contributors report observed state for their domain — descriptive only, no prescriptive next-action arrays. Runtime authority is the zod schema in src/contributors/validation.ts; this JSON Schema serves as published documentation and external tooling integration.

domain.description: Human-readable name of the domain this contributor reports on (e.g. 'SDLC', 'Research corpus', 'Media library').

description.description: One-line description of what this contributor reports.

detect.description: Declarative detection spec. Determines whether the framework is in use on this project. No script execution.

glob.description: Glob patterns relative to project root. The aggregator deduplicates matches across all patterns.

minCount.description: Minimum unique matched files to count as in-use. Default: 1.

conditions.description: Reserved for future regex-against-content checks. Currently unused.

fields.description: Optional declarative field extractors. Each entry pulls a value out of a file using regex or count. Lets contributors stay data-driven; the aggregator reads these to populate the report block.

source.description: Path (relative to project root) of the file to read.

regex.description: Regex with one capture group to extract the field value.

count.description: Regex pattern; the field value is the count of matching lines in the source file.
